title: d2c Flow Decisions Lock
description: Per-decision lock file emitted by /d2c-build-flow Phase 2a step 9 immediately after flow-graph.json validates. Freezes every flow-level choice (mode, shell, project_conventions, stepper_groups) plus per-page and per-edge decisions so Phase 3/4/5 retries converge instead of silently re-deciding. Mirrors skills/d2c-build/schemas/decisions-lock.schema.json — same lifecycle (locked → failed → re-locked), same failed_by enum, same atomic-write semantics. The flow_graph_hash field anchors this lock to a specific flow-graph.json; a hash mismatch on resume fires F-FLOW-LOCK-MISSING (auto-recover, regenerate).

schema_version.description: Lock artifact schema version. v1 only in MVP.

locked_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp (with timezone) of when this lock file was first written. Re-locks after a 'failed' status update keep this field; only the per-decision locked_at advances.

flow_graph_hash.description: SHA-256 hex of the flow-graph.json content this lock was derived from. Used by Phase 4 walker checkpoint and any resume path to detect drift between lock and IR. Mismatch => fire F-FLOW-LOCK-MISSING and regenerate the lock.

flow_decisions.description: Top-level flow-shape decisions (mode + shell + project_conventions). One lock entry per decision.

page_decisions.description: Per-page locked decisions. Keys are page node_id from flow-graph.pages[]; values are objects whose own keys are decision names (e.g. 'route', 'layout_applied', 'mobile_variant_figma_url') and values are lock entries.

edge_decisions.description: Per-edge locked decisions. Keys are '<from_node_id>__<to_node_id>' (forming a unique edge identifier); values are objects whose keys are decision names ('source_component_node_id', 'trigger', 'condition_kind', 'condition_field', 'condition_value') and values are lock entries.

lock_entry.description: A single locked decision. 'locked' is immutable; only 'failed' may be re-decided on retry. failure_reason / failed_at / failed_by are present only when status === 'failed'.

value.description: The locked value. Type depends on the decision: string ('routes' | 'stepper' | 'hybrid' for mode), boolean (shell_detected), null (unset), object (project_conventions sub-blocks), or array (stepper_groups). Validators cross-check against the current flow-graph.json.

status.description: 'locked' = immutable, do not re-decide. 'failed' = may be re-decided on retry; downstream phases may overwrite with a new value + locked_at.

locked_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this decision was locked (or re-locked after re-decision).

failure_reason.description: Present only when status is 'failed'. Human-readable explanation of why this decision needs re-decision (e.g. 'Phase 4a walker pixel-diff exhausted max-rounds at 78% on /onboarding step 2').

failed_at.description: Present only when status is 'failed'. ISO 8601 timestamp when failure was marked.

failed_by.description: Present only when status is 'failed'. Which mechanism marked the failure. phase4_walker covers the unified flow-walker; phase4b_navsmoke covers the navigation smoke test.

flow_decisions.description: Top-level flow decisions. Each field is itself a lock_entry. mode_confidence and shell_node_id are conditionally required (mode_confidence when mode_source === 'auto'; shell_node_id when shell_detected.value === true).

mode.description: value MUST be one of 'routes' | 'stepper' | 'hybrid'. The auto sentinel is never stored — it's resolved to a terminal value before the lock is written.

mode_source.description: value MUST be 'explicit' | 'auto'. Tracks whether the mode came from a user directive or auto-detection.

mode_confidence.description: value MUST be a number in [0, 1]. Present when mode_source === 'auto'; absent when mode_source === 'explicit'.

shell_detected.description: value MUST be a boolean. True when detect-shared-shell.js identified a shared layout component above threshold.

shell_node_id.description: value MUST be a string (Figma node id of the shared shell). Present only when shell_detected.value === true.

project_conventions.description: Each sub-decision is its own lock_entry. The flow's per-variant /d2c-build dispatches read these via the structured-input payload.

stepper_groups.description: value MUST be an array of stepper-group lock summaries: [{name, route, validation_enabled, persistence}]. Empty array for mode === 'routes'.
